title: BlazeCraft Infinite
description: This modpack features various QOL enhancements and performance mods designed to make the game run smoother. It is a Vanilla+ modpack that users can make use of all or some of the mods in this pack, allowing them to create their ideal Minecraft experience.
body:
![Banner 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc073c908e8e973ce1c9630edb0fbc75a7e73954_0.webp)

This modpack features various QOL enhancements and performance mods designed to make the game run smoother. It is a Vanilla+ modpack that users can make use of all or some of the mods in this pack, allowing them to create their ideal Minecraft experience. This pack is tailor made for the BlazeCraft Minecraft Server.

 

Standout mods include:

Litematica - A mod that allows users to build in Creative, store the design, and easily recreate it in Survival.

Simple Voice Chat - An in-game proximity-based voice chat system.

Sodium - A mod for general optimization that improves frame rates, reduces micro-stutter, and fixes other graphical issues.

Iris Shaders - A shader pack that works in tandem with Sodium to provide overhauled visuals in the game.

Item Scroller - An inventory management mod

Tweakeroo - Adds various tweaks to the game

 

and many more mods that add small tweaks to the game to help it run smoother and look better!
